hero.badge: Free to use — no credit card required
hero.title: Go multilingual
hero.description: Add a language switcher to your website instantly. Your visitors translate your content into their native language — right in the browser.

features.title: Everything you need
features.description: Simple, powerful, and completely free. No server setup, no complicated integrations.

setup.title: One-Line Setup
setup.description: Paste a single script tag into your HTML. That's it — your site is multilingual.

languages.title: 100+ Languages
languages.description: Powered by Google Translate. Support for every major language out of the box.

cost.title: Zero Server Cost
cost.description: Translation runs entirely in the visitor's browser. No API keys, no backend.

analytics.title: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.description: See which languages your visitors use. Track translations by page and region.

customizable.title: Fully Customizable
customizable.description: Match your brand with custom colors, position, size, and theme options.

speed.title: Instant Load
speed.description: Async loading means zero impact on your page speed or Core Web Vitals.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.description: Three steps to a multilingual website.

1.title: Create your account
1.description: Sign up for free. No credit card needed.

2.title: Register your website
2.description: Add your domain and choose which languages to support.

3.title: Paste the code
3.description: Copy the generated script tag and add it to your site's <head>.

howItWorks.codeLabel: Add this one line to your site

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.description: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for small sites or trying it out

cta.title: Make your website global today
cta.description: Join thousands of websites using Language Switcher to reach a worldwide audience.

overview.title: Welcome back
overview.subtitle: Here's an overview of your language switcher setup.
overview.step1Desc: Add your website domain and choose which languages to support.
overview.step2Desc: Get a personalized script tag for your website.
overview.step3Desc: Add the script tag to your site's <head>. Done!

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: Manage your registered websites and widget configurations.
sites.dialogDescription: Enter your website domain and choose your language settings.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Translation usage analytics for your sites.
insights.noSites: No sites registered yet. Add a site first to see insights.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and widget preferences.
settings.widgetSettingsDesc: Customize the appearance of your widget.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your account
login.illustrationDesc: Add a language switcher to your website and let visitors browse in their native language.
